mapper.select: SELECT i.id, i.price_id, m.number AS f_material_id, m.name AS fMaterialName, m.specification AS fMaterialModel, i.f_khhh, i.f_price, i.f_bzyq, i.f_bzmx, i.f_ywpm, i.fzxzlxgrq, i.f_c, i.f_k, i.f_g, i.f_mz, i.f_jz, i.fbgrq, i.f_ywbzfs, i.f_cptp2, i.f_cptp3, i.f_jgdztp, i.f_wxtm, i.f_wxzm, i.f_wxcm, i.f_nxzm, i.f_nxcm, i.f_ctt, i.f_smst, i.f_ctaot, i.f_cht, i.f_dkczz, i.f_zxczz, i.f_tm, i.f_bzt, i.packaging_categories, s.name AS f_gys FROM t_sales_price_item i LEFT JOIN by_material m ON i.f_material_id = m.k3_id LEFT JOIN supplier s ON i.f_gys = s.supplierid WHERE i.price_id = #{priceId}

select * from t_sales_price_item where f_material_id in
#{materialId}
select * from t_sales_price_item where price_id = #{priceId} and f_material_id = #{materialId}
mapper.insert: insert into t_sales_price_item( price_id,f_number, f_material_id, f_khhh, f_price, f_bzyq, f_bzmx, f_ywpm, fzxzlxgrq, f_c, f_k, f_g, f_mz, f_jz, fbgrq, f_ywbzfs, f_cptp2, f_cptp3, f_jgdztp, f_wxtm, f_wxzm, f_wxcm, f_nxzm, f_nxcm, f_ctt, f_smst, f_ctaot, f_cht, f_dkczz, f_zxczz, f_tm, f_bzt, f_gys, packaging_categories ) values( #{priceId},#{fNumber}, #{fMaterialId}, #{fKhhh}, #{fPrice}, #{fBzyq}, #{fBzmx}, #{fYwpm}, #{fzxzlxgrq}, #{fC}, #{fK}, #{fG}, #{fMz}, #{fJz}, #{fbgrq}, #{fYwbzfs}, #{fCptp2}, #{fCptp3}, #{fJgdztp}, #{fWxtm}, #{fWxzm}, #{fWxcm}, #{fNxzm}, #{fNxcm}, #{fCtt}, #{fSmst}, #{fCtaot}, #{fCht}, #{fDkczz}, #{fZxczz}, #{ftm}, #{fBzt}, #{fGys}, #{packagingCategories} )

insert into t_sales_price_item( price_id,f_number, f_material_id, f_khhh, f_price, f_bzyq, f_bzmx, f_ywpm, fzxzlxgrq, f_c, f_k, f_g, f_mz, f_jz, fbgrq, f_ywbzfs, f_cptp2, f_cptp3, f_jgdztp, f_wxtm, f_wxzm, f_wxcm, f_nxzm, f_nxcm, f_ctt, f_smst, f_ctaot, f_cht, f_dkczz, f_zxczz, f_tm, f_bzt, f_gys, packaging_categories ) values
( #{i.priceId},#{i.fNumber}, #{i.fMaterialId}, #{i.fKhhh}, #{i.fPrice}, #{i.fBzyq}, #{i.fBzmx}, #{i.fYwpm}, #{i.fzxzlxgrq}, #{i.fC}, #{i.fK}, #{i.fG}, #{i.fMz}, #{i.fJz}, #{i.fbgrq}, #{i.fYwbzfs}, #{i.fCptp2}, #{i.fCptp3}, #{i.fJgdztp}, #{i.fWxtm}, #{i.fWxzm}, #{i.fWxcm}, #{i.fNxzm}, #{i.fNxcm}, #{i.fCtt}, #{i.fSmst}, #{i.fCtaot}, #{i.fCht}, #{i.fDkczz}, #{i.fZxczz}, #{i.ftm}, #{i.fBzt}, #{i.fGys}, #{i.packagingCategories} )
